programme.title: S3E2 Adventure Series
programme.desc: The journey continues with Dr. Ingrid Visser, a marine pioneer devoted to protecting the ocean’s most intelligent predator, the orca. She swims with wild orcas and leads the charge for innovative solutions to end captivity. Witness never-before-seen footage captured by a GoPro mounted to the dorsal fin of a wild orca, paired with rare archival material from the Orca Research Trust. This is exploration and conservation at their most inspiring. In the wide-open skies and sweeping valleys of the Mustang Monument Wild Horse Eco-Resort & Sanctuary, more than 600 Wild American Mustangs roam free. Cowboy and family man Clay Nannini reveals the importance of preserving this symbol of American heritage while passing its legacy to his children. As night falls, Tokyo becomes an electrifying playground for those who crave speed and style. The city’s custom vehicle culture bursts to life, introducing unforgettable characters and rides unlike anything you have seen before. Lamborghinis, Hayabusas, RWB Porsches, and Kaido Racers create a visual feast on the streets of Tokyo after dark.

programme.title: S3E3 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of four incredible adventures and discover how they came to life. At the Mustang Monument Wild Horse Eco-Resort & Sanctuary, over 600 Wild American Mustangs roam the sweeping valleys and open skies. Cowboy and family man Clay Nannini shares the passion and dedication it takes to preserve this living symbol of American heritage. In Tokyo, the crew captures the city’s transformation after dark into a high-octane playground where custom car culture thrives. From Lamborghinis to RWB Porsches, Hayabusas to Kaido Racers, every frame is a visual thrill. In the icy waters of Greenland’s Disko Bay, the team follows professional ice climbers Klemen Premrl and Aljaz Anderle as they take on a fragile and unpredictable iceberg, facing nature’s challenges and learning powerful lessons along the way. The journey closes with Dr. Ingrid Visser’s mission to protect the orca. Viewers are treated to never-before-seen footage from a GoPro mounted to a wild orca’s dorsal fin along with rare archival material from the Orca Research Trust. This is an unmissable look at the grit, passion, and artistry behind creating these extraordinary stories.

programme.title: S1E1 Moto
programme.desc: Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa on the adventure of a lifetime as they explore the vibrant cities and stunning beaches of Morocco. Plus, enjoy exclusive bonus footage featuring the very best of GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S1E2 Moto
programme.desc: The journey continues as we follow two brothers on their 2,300-kilometer adventure across Morocco. Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa as they experience vibrant cities, breathtaking beaches, and the adventure of a lifetime. Plus, enjoy bonus footage of Jeremy Seewer. With 50 podiums, 11 victories, 17 race wins, and five FIM Motocross World Championship silver medals, his record is remarkable — yet his story goes far beyond the numbers.

programme.title: S2E1 Moto
programme.desc: Celebrate the women of GoPro, including British rally driver Catie Munnings, who rose to fame after winning the FIA European Rally Championship Ladies Trophy at just 18. Watch snowboarder Alina Hight who made history as the first to land a double backside alley-oop rodeo in a halfpipe competition. Meet Teigan Nash, co-founder of Girls Who Glow, inspiring young women everywhere. Plus, experience even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: Hybrid World: The Plan to Modify and Control the Human Race
programme.desc: Behind closed doors scientists and corporations have breached genetic codes that separate the individuality of all animal and plant species on earth. Laboratories around the world are honing their skills while our humanity and dignity as a species is on the operating table like a universal Frankenstein, subject to a wholesale psychic and physiological re-design under the guise of progress. The proponents claim the field of "Transhumanism" will change the world by eliminating sickness and famine while at the same time, governments and military groups around the globe are having clandestine meetings to discuss super soldiers, super intelligence, and even super animals to maintain military dominance and control over the populations of the world. Even more horrifying they must create committees to implement plans to defend their nations against future terrorism performed by transhumans (modified human beings) with the universal understanding that no nation can afford NOT to engage in this apocalyptic future of genetically altered life. We are at war for the mind of a generation and the soul of the human race. Billions of dollars are at stake with corporations and powerful individuals looking toward a post human future world. If we care about our humanity, then the time is NOW to stand up and understand where science and technology are taking us and to do something about it. Our foods are already being genetically altered with devastating side effects which are now coming to light. Will we allow experiments with genetic engineering to excel to a horrifying level where they create an unthinkable race of non-human entities? What level of horrifying abominations have already been committed?

programme.title: California Paranormal
programme.desc: SHORT - (Cable / Digital) California is a weird place, but just how weird can best be told by residents with bone chilling true stories of Paranormal and Supernatural encounters that defy description - from Alien visitations to Poltergeist manifestations that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: The Dark Mirror of Magick
programme.desc: "This is the most remarkable record of a supernatural event I have ever witnessed." - Wayne Darwen, Director. On January 3rd, 2001, documentary writer/producer Wayne Darwen brought a professional TV news crew into the Temple of the O.T.A. to visually record a remarkable event: the summoning of the ancient spirit Vassago. On February 1st, the Los Angeles affiliate of a National TV Network broadcast an edited version of Vassago's Prophecy, confirming that the Spirit had predicted a major news event. Only 13 days after the ritual was visually recorded, President Laurent Kabila of the Congo was assassinated! In this video version we show you the entire operation in sequence, exactly as it happened with no rehearsals and no retakes. Wayne Darwen also interviews the Magister Thabion (Poke Runyon) and the mystic seer Frater Solomon. Their unrehearsed answers to his probing questions leave no doubt as to the philosophical depth and spiritual power of Solomon's ancient Magick even in this modern age. In "The Magick of Solomon" video we dramatically reenacted magical rituals for instructive purposes, whereas "Dark Mirror of Magick" is the record of an actual magical operation of historical significance. We believe that this remarkable documentary will be studied and commented on for years to come.This 2011 edition has ten more minutes of new footage added with commentary on the Vassago Prophecy, as subsequently revealed in the following two years, plus a new prophecy from Vassago himself. Viewer discretion is advised, do not engage in these practices without the supervision of an experienced adept.CAUTION; This DVD shows actual Spirit Summoning, not recommended for immature viewers.

programme.title: Nacho Mountain
programme.desc: Keefer has a talent. He can eat...A LOT. But it’s not until after getting fired from his job, finding his girl getting railed by a tranny and almost getting arrested for drug trafficking, that Keefer decides (with the help of his best friend Meegosh) to start an underground food eating competition. After the health crazed Mayor Fingstal and his cronies Officers Slivjack and Biggsley catch wind of it, all hell breaks loose. Then it all comes down to one final food battle from hell, THE NACHO MOUNTAIN! Set to a killer Stoner Rock soundtrack with loads of babes and crazy characters in the vein of Porky's and Meatballs, Nacho Mountain is sure to please those who have gotten beaten down, only to eat their way to the top!

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Chris and Cindy sit down with Jenn and Lanny to take a deep dive into last night’s mission. If it wasn’t difficult enough to do a full day of Surviving Mann training, an overnight mission with no breaks seems to be the cherry on top. After a refreshing 2 hours of sleep, the contestants were back at it with an Olympic-level PT session hosted by Lanny. From there, Jen fills us in on a secret new product in the next episode of Surviving Mann that reminds her of... Fembots? Stay tuned.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The wrath of Mann is upon the contestants as Don doles out punishments to the entire squad for one person’s mistake. On the tails of the punishment, Don leads everyone in a lesson on BUD/S training. Later, co-host and retired Green Beret, Mike Glover, gives the contestants a life lesson on survival they won’t soon forget. To top off the episode, one of the contestants demonstrates his industry-changing hollow point bullets in some meaty targets.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Kyle and Caleb give the skinny on the hamstring pull that was heard around the world. From there, Surviving Mann fans get a glimpse at just how far Faraday containers can go to protect your security, privacy and device. After, Black Aces does a deep dive into their available products and some exciting plans for the future.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Sheriff Mark Lamb (Surviving Mann) and UFC Hall of Famer Ken Shamrock (Surviving Mann) uncover a breakthrough changing how we live in a world full of invisible forces. Join them as Aires Tech reveals the science behind a revolutionary technology built to protect the human body from electromagnetic stress—empowering performance in a wired world.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: From the ocean to the lab, The Big Reveal dives deeper into the hidden impact of electromagnetic pollution. Discover how Aires Tech is helping people, animals, and even bees thrive—unlocking the secrets to balance, vitality, and true wellness in our connected age.

programme.title: Around the ACL
programme.desc: ATA 209: Kansas City Recap, Chamberlain Takes Singles, and the Signature #3 Stock Exchange Signature #3 in Kansas City delivered, and Around the ACL is breaking it all down. Meesh, Jake, and Anthony recap a huge weekend, starting with Mark Richards and Tony Smith taking control in Doubles and Logan Chamberlain adding another big Singles win to his resume. We also hit all divisions—Sarah Cassidy gets it done in Women’s Singles, Matt Guy continues to dominate the Seniors division (including a Doubles win with Frank Modlin), and the next generation shows out with Gabriel Clauson and Madden Franco/Jase Webb grabbing Junior titles. Then we close it out with a brand new segment: the Signature #3 Stock Exchange. Who are we buying after Kansas City? Who are we selling off? And who are we holding steady as the season rolls on?

programme.title: S3E2 Adventure Series
programme.desc: The journey continues with Dr. Ingrid Visser, a marine pioneer devoted to protecting the ocean’s most intelligent predator, the orca. She swims with wild orcas and leads the charge for innovative solutions to end captivity. Witness never-before-seen footage captured by a GoPro mounted to the dorsal fin of a wild orca, paired with rare archival material from the Orca Research Trust. This is exploration and conservation at their most inspiring. In the wide-open skies and sweeping valleys of the Mustang Monument Wild Horse Eco-Resort & Sanctuary, more than 600 Wild American Mustangs roam free. Cowboy and family man Clay Nannini reveals the importance of preserving this symbol of American heritage while passing its legacy to his children. As night falls, Tokyo becomes an electrifying playground for those who crave speed and style. The city’s custom vehicle culture bursts to life, introducing unforgettable characters and rides unlike anything you have seen before. Lamborghinis, Hayabusas, RWB Porsches, and Kaido Racers create a visual feast on the streets of Tokyo after dark.

programme.title: S3E3 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of four incredible adventures and discover how they came to life. At the Mustang Monument Wild Horse Eco-Resort & Sanctuary, over 600 Wild American Mustangs roam the sweeping valleys and open skies. Cowboy and family man Clay Nannini shares the passion and dedication it takes to preserve this living symbol of American heritage. In Tokyo, the crew captures the city’s transformation after dark into a high-octane playground where custom car culture thrives. From Lamborghinis to RWB Porsches, Hayabusas to Kaido Racers, every frame is a visual thrill. In the icy waters of Greenland’s Disko Bay, the team follows professional ice climbers Klemen Premrl and Aljaz Anderle as they take on a fragile and unpredictable iceberg, facing nature’s challenges and learning powerful lessons along the way. The journey closes with Dr. Ingrid Visser’s mission to protect the orca. Viewers are treated to never-before-seen footage from a GoPro mounted to a wild orca’s dorsal fin along with rare archival material from the Orca Research Trust. This is an unmissable look at the grit, passion, and artistry behind creating these extraordinary stories.

programme.title: S1E1 Moto
programme.desc: Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa on the adventure of a lifetime as they explore the vibrant cities and stunning beaches of Morocco. Plus, enjoy exclusive bonus footage featuring the very best of GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S1E2 Moto
programme.desc: The journey continues as we follow two brothers on their 2,300-kilometer adventure across Morocco. Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa as they experience vibrant cities, breathtaking beaches, and the adventure of a lifetime. Plus, enjoy bonus footage of Jeremy Seewer. With 50 podiums, 11 victories, 17 race wins, and five FIM Motocross World Championship silver medals, his record is remarkable — yet his story goes far beyond the numbers.

programme.title: S2E1 Moto
programme.desc: Celebrate the women of GoPro, including British rally driver Catie Munnings, who rose to fame after winning the FIA European Rally Championship Ladies Trophy at just 18. Watch snowboarder Alina Hight who made history as the first to land a double backside alley-oop rodeo in a halfpipe competition. Meet Teigan Nash, co-founder of Girls Who Glow, inspiring young women everywhere. Plus, experience even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: 2024 TUDOR NAZARÉ Big Wave Challenge | REPLAY
programme.desc: The Big Wave tour resumed after 2 years at Nazaré to pristine conditions as the TUDOR Nazaré Big Wave Challenge started to roll. Watch as Big Wave heavies displayed critical teamwork to tow into massive Nazaré. Nazaré, Portugal is home to the biggest waves on Earth. In the TUDOR Nazaré Big Wave Challenge, two-person teams made up of men and women take turns surfing and driving the jetski as they compete in potentially record-setting surf. The WSL Big Wave season is the time of year when humans push the boundaries of what’s possible on a surfboard. In the sport’s premier paddle-only event at Jaws and tow surfing challenge at Nazaré, these men and women drop in and charge the impossible for the ride of a lifetime.

programme.title: 2025 TUDOR NAZARÉ Big Wave Challenge | REPLAY
programme.desc: The deepwater canyon of Portugal's famous Nazaré set the stage for Big Wave's finest to battle for the 2025 Tudor Nazaré Big Wave Challenge. Heavy wipeouts, full sends, and a clash of defending champs taking on perennial Big Wave standouts provided plenty of adrenaline-pumping action. Nic Von Rupp and Clement Roseyro emerged victorious with Justine Dupont stamping her authority at the arena of Nazaré once more to top the women's leaderboard alongside Roseyro taking the men's leaderboard win.

programme.title: 2023 Billabong Pro Pipeline Finals Day | REPLAY
programme.desc: As the epicenter of the surf universe and the birthplace of the sport, it’s only right for Pipeline to kick off the Championship Tour. Everyone enters the season with equal hopes of winning it all. The rookie class is thrown into the fire, the contenders return with one thing on their minds, and the surf world begins to follow the road to the Rip Curl WSL Finals. Pipeline sets the tone.

programme.title: WSL Competition Highlights
programme.desc: See all the best scores from the WSL surfing season.

programme.title: Trans-Saharan Highway | Brilliant Corners: Algeria, Episode 3
programme.desc: After heading inland for a whirlwind adventure in the Sahara Desert, the crew says farewell to Lucy as she heads home to Australia. Back in Algiers, Sam, Erwan, and Dihya visit one of the country's leading digital agencies to discuss their journey and go for one last surf in some perfect longboard waves. Before leaving the country, Sam and Erwan talk with local surfers Dihya and Walid about the future of surfing in Algeria and how the emergence of the sport could impact the people there.
